## Checklist
- [ ] `uv run ruff check riftor dev` passes
- [ ] `uv run python dev/smoke.py` passes (all `*_OK`)
- [ ] Added/updated a check in `dev/smoke.py` for new behavior (where practical)
- [ ] Docs/README/`todo.md` updated if behavior or commands changed
- [ ] Change is for authorized security use (no malware / third-party targeting)
